name: Kahala
desc: The Beverly Hills of Hawaii — oceanfront mansions, old money, ultra-safe, quiet tree-lined streets minutes from Waikiki.
sources: Quora/OahuRE · OahuTripPlanners · Niche residents · AreaVibes crime data
insider: Kahala Hotel beach path is free and open to the public — locals walk it at sunset for dolphin sightings in the lagoon
Tuesday farmers market at Waialae has the best lilikoi butter on the island
The hidden reef in front of Kahala Hotel is a top snorkel spot with green sea turtles year-round
Avoid Kahala Ave during school drop-off 7:30–8:15am — total gridlock from Kahala Elementary and Star of the Sea
Plumeria Beach House at the Kahala Hotel does a killer Sunday brunch — residents get the best tables
Median home price hovers around $2.5M — even 'modest' Kahala homes start above $1.5M
Obama vacationed in Kailua during his presidency, but the Kahala Hotel has hosted nearly every sitting US president since LBJ — its security and seclusion make it the go-to presidential venue
Kahala Mall's Whole Foods is the unofficial neighborhood social scene — you'll see everyone there
The Waialae Country Club hosts the Sony Open every January — the only PGA Tour event in Hawaii
Virtually zero street crime — HPD stats consistently rank Kahala as the safest neighborhood in Honolulu
Walk the shoreline from Kahala Beach to Waialae Beach Park at low tide — a gorgeous hidden coastal stroll
